series_metadata.series_description: ﻿Electronic Benefits Transfer provides federal, state and local governments, and retailers with a systematic method to replace paper food stamp coupons with a plastic EBT Direction Card. File contains all backup materials for bids, contract proposals and deliverables, retailer information, meeting agendas and minutes of the federal EBT Task Force, and related correspondence pertaining to the project, including system printouts of data extracted from Client Registry Information System-Enhanced (CRIS-E).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years until audits are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved, ; Electronic: Retain in office until audits are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved,, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
